CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, val DOUBLE);
SELECT id, json.tojsonarray(val) FROM another_table WHERE val IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE joined_table (a DOUBLE, b DOUBLE);
SELECT json.tojsonarray(subquery.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value > 0) AS subquery;
SELECT id, json.tojsonarray((SELECT val FROM another_table WHERE id = joined_table.a)) FROM joined_table;
CREATE VIEW view_test AS SELECT json.tojsonarray(value) AS json_array FROM test_table;
SELECT * FROM view_test WHERE json_array IS NOT NULL;
